per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any sweating or clamminess when the symptoms hit?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I did notice some sweating during those episodes, yeah.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, yes. I mentioned earlier that I did get a little sweaty during those episodes. It was just mild - I don't know how to describe it, but it's definitely been there when the chest tightness is happening.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Does it radiate anywhere — like your arms, neck, or jaw?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: It radiates to my left arm.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any tingling or numbness in your arms when it happens?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I did notice some tingling in my left arm during the more severe episodes. It's hard to describe, but it feels like a pins-and-needles sensation.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere? Ankles, feet, hands?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, I have been noticing some mild bilateral ankle swelling. My shoes do feel a bit tighter than usual.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do your shoes feel tighter than usual, or any puffiness in your legs?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, my shoes feel tighter than usual and there's just a general feeling of puffiness in my ankles and lower legs.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any stomach issues during the episodes? Nausea, queasiness, upset stomach?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, I get a little nauseous during those chest tightness episodes. It's not too bad, just a mild feeling of discomfort in my stomach.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any medical problems in your family? Parents, siblings?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My dad had a heart attack at age 52 and passed away. My mom has hypertension and type 2 diabetes, but she's still alive at 78.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, has anyone in your family had serious diseases?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My dad passed away from a heart attack when he was 52 years old.
